updates.prompt: Update the Bannon Engine model pipeline by automating the conversion of Tripo3D meshes into rig-ready assets, including script-based scaling to 1.88m and integration with the GORO_RIG system...
updates.action_taken: Upgraded NexusMeshForge with an automated pipeline (`automateTripo3DIngestionAndRigging`) to natively ingest Tripo3D meshes, automatically scale them to the canonical 1.88m height, and pipe them directly into the GORO_RIG system for immediate 15-bone structural attachment without manual intervention. Acknowledged deep lore validations for Book 4/5 integration, AR 'Level 99', and faction alignments for non-canon characters.
